title: bulbophyllum calvum
intro: Bulbophyllum calvum, also known as the hairy Bulbophyllum, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum calvum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum calvum can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
